description: In this episode of Chewing Glass, T.J. Littlejohn, founder of Mountain Pay, discusses his journey from studying math to becoming a developer in the Solana ecosystem. He shares insights on his experience at Apple and his transition to startups, highlighting the importance of hackathons in his career development.
topic_summary: T.J. Littlejohn talks about his background in math and coding, his time at Apple, and his current work in the Solana ecosystem, emphasizing the role of hackathons in his career path [t=44:22].
